name: a2-harness-panel
description: Read-only / command-generating VS Code + Cursor panel for the A2 IDE harness v0. Drives scripts/a2-ide-harness.sh in print/validate-only modes through an argv-bounded wrapper, renders its stdout, and offers copy-to-clipboard for the helper-printed chain commands. The panel never spawns claw, never executes preview/approval/apply-bundle/apply, never composes the approval line, and has no Run-* execution buttons. Bounded by docs/a2-l4-ide-extension-panel-scope.md.

commands.title: A2 Harness: Paste Tier 3 Evidence Snapshot (read-only)
A2 Harness: Refresh Tier 3 Evidence Snapshot (read-only)

a2HarnessPanel.helperPath.description: Path to the print/validate-only A2 IDE harness helper. Relative paths resolve against the workspace folder. The panel only ever invokes this helper with a read-only/print subcommand; it never invokes `claw` or any chain-write command.
